THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEINSTEIN, MATTHEW IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SHOW/PRESENT COMPETENT EVIDENCE RE: DENTAL MALPRACTICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
